name: Earth's Remnant
description: Earth's resistance. The Remnant is not a unified faction; it is a cause people find in their own way. The Duskway runners run people and supplies through the blockade the Compact holds around the system. The black market networks operate out of the cities that survived the glassing, the basements and the back rooms. The underground government rebuilds what was destroyed, in the shadow of a navy that has already proven it will use warheads on its own territory. The Remnant's politics are local, regional, and contradictory. Its shared position is the demand: end the blockade, restore sovereignty, run the Duskway until the Duskway is not needed.
